hyperedges.label: PCRM Control Plane, Nomad Execution, Supabase Identity/Storage
Kong Gateway Routing to Supabase Microservices
Docker Log Collection to Logflare Analytics

nodes.label: On-Prem Batch Cloud
nodes.rationale: Targets on-premises batch workloads rather than multi-tenant public cloud; billing uses prepaid lease minutes.

nodes.label: Spring Boot Control Plane
nodes.rationale: Backend orchestrates jobs, quotas, billing, and storage; chosen as the application control plane.

nodes.label: Nomad Workload Execution
nodes.rationale: Nomad runs batch workloads; separates scheduling/execution from the Spring Boot API layer.

nodes.label: Self-Hosted Supabase
nodes.rationale: Provides identity (Auth/JWT), Postgres, REST, Storage, and Studio without external SaaS dependency.

nodes.label: Flyway Database Migrations
nodes.rationale: Schema evolution via classpath db/migration; grouped migrations with flyway_schema_history table.

nodes.label: Nomad State Sync
nodes.rationale: Periodic sync reconciles Nomad job state with backend records; stale-timeout evicts orphaned entries.

nodes.label: Prepaid Quota Lease Minutes
nodes.rationale: Default 15-minute lease window for prepaid compute quota enforcement.

nodes.label: Fair Queue Job Dispatcher
nodes.rationale: Dispatch interval with base quantum and age boost per minute implements fair queue scheduling.

nodes.label: Lease Enforcer Scheduler
nodes.rationale: Periodic lease enforcement with safety window and batch size prevents quota overruns.

nodes.label: Transactional Outbox Pattern
nodes.rationale: Outbox worker polls, claims, and retries domain events for reliable async delivery.

nodes.label: Idempotency Key Cleanup
nodes.rationale: Cron-based cleanup removes stale idempotency records after retention period.

nodes.label: Job Artifact Finalizer
nodes.rationale: Finalizer interval and missing-timeout reconcile uploaded job artifacts in object storage.

nodes.label: H2 In-Memory Test Database
nodes.rationale: H2 with PostgreSQL mode and h2-auth.sql init script enables fast isolated unit/integration tests without Docker.

nodes.label: Kong Key-Auth and ACL Pattern
nodes.rationale: anon and service_role consumers map to key-auth credentials; ACL groups gate admin vs anon access on secure routes.

nodes.label: Storage S3 Presigned URL Handling
nodes.rationale: Storage route omits key-auth; post-function strips empty Authorization so S3 presigned query-param signatures work.

hyperedges.label: PCRM Control Plane, Nomad Execution, Supabase Identity/Storage
Kong Gateway Routing to Supabase Microservices
Docker Log Collection to Logflare Analytics
